name: zemacs-gui
description: zemacs-gui — desktop GUI wrapper around the zemacs editor (Helix fork). Runs the zemacs binary in an embedded PTY terminal with the shared zgui-core baseline.

scripts.dev: pnpm install && node scripts/copy-embed-terminal.mjs && tauri dev
scripts.build: pnpm install && node scripts/copy-embed-terminal.mjs && tauri build
